---
title: "Workshops"
listing:
  - id: ehr
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [image, title]
    contents: 
      - gitworkshop
      - rladiesworkshopquarto
      - lss2026
    type: grid
    grid-item-border: true
    sort: false
---

Here are a list of workshops I've hosted (with their related materials).

::: {#ehr}
:::
